title: Implement User Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
description: To enhance security, users should be required to set up MFA using an authenticator app (TOTP). This should be required for all admin users and optional for regular users.
acceptance_criteria: Users can enable MFA in their profile settings by scanning a QR code.
Login flow must prompt for a 6-digit TOTP code if MFA is enabled.
Admin users are blocked from accessing the dashboard until MFA is configured.
